event.name: US Open 2027 Men's Semifinal — Jannik Sinner vs Carlos Alcaraz
event.venue: Arthur Ashe Stadium, New York (night session)

context.pre_match_notes: US Open SF on hard court, night session at Ashe. Sinner: hard court win rate 80%, 2× US Open champion, dominant in 5-set matches. Alcaraz: hard court win rate 75%, prefers clay/grass, no US Open title. H2H hard court: Sinner leads 4-2. Night session at Ashe — atmosphere, noise, Sinner accustomed to it.

question: Predict match direction in a hard court SF between two current top players. What signal variables tip the balance?

verified_outcome.key_variable: surface_hard_court_modifier + H2H_record + US_Open_experience — Sinner structural advantages compound
